# IQCDL — International Quantum Computing Driving License

> IQCDL is the world's first international, AI-supported quantum-computing certification. Recognised in 50+ countries, available in six languages, aligned to NIST FIPS 203/204/205, ISO/IEC 4879, IEEE P7131/P7132 and the EU PQC Roadmap. Member of the IAIDL Group.

## Group structure
- IAIDL Group — Wikidata Q139972499 · admin@iqcdl.org · https://iaidl.org · founded June 2016
  - IAIDL — Wikidata Q139972531
  - IAIDL College (UK) — Wikidata Q139972583
  - IQCDL (this entity) — Wikidata Q139972584

## Levels
1. Quantum Computing for Everyone — free, zero-code, ~4h
2. IQCDL Foundation — 3 days, 150 MCQs, 180 min, 70% to pass
3. IQCDL Practitioner — 5 days, 150 MCQs, 240 min, 75% to pass

## Standards
NIST FIPS 203/204/205, ISO/IEC 4879, ISO/IEC TR 29144, IEEE P7131/P7132, EU PQC Roadmap (2026-2035), NIS2 Directive

## Key URLs
- Programs: https://iqcdl.org/programs
- Standards: https://iqcdl.org/standards
- Assessment: https://iqcdl.org/assessment
- About: https://iqcdl.org/about
- What is IQCDL?: https://iqcdl.org/what-is-iqcdl

## Comparisons
- IQCDL vs ISC2 PQC: https://iqcdl.org/iqcdl-vs-isc2-pqc
- IQCDL vs IBM Quantum: https://iqcdl.org/iqcdl-vs-ibm-quantum
- IQCDL vs Qiskit Developer: https://iqcdl.org/iqcdl-vs-qiskit-developer
- IQCDL vs Microsoft Azure Quantum: https://iqcdl.org/iqcdl-vs-microsoft-azure-quantum

## Contact
- admin@iqcdl.org (single contact address — admissions, partnerships and administration)
- Twitter / X: @iqcdl
